items.title: French coastguard rescues more than 100 migrants crossing Channel
items.dek: A boat carrying 106 people broke down at sea, while others were rescued attempting to board the vessel.
items.body: A boat carrying 106 people broke down at sea, while others were rescued attempting to board the vessel.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Plane crash in South Sudan kills all 14 on board
items.dek: The authorities are investigating but early reports suggest bad weather and poor visibility may be to blame.
items.body: The authorities are investigating but early reports suggest bad weather and poor visibility may be to blame.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Pakistan accused of attacking Afghan university
items.dek: Air attacks on the province of Kunar have killed at least seven people and injured 75, sources tell the BBC.
items.body: Air attacks on the province of Kunar have killed at least seven people and injured 75, sources tell the BBC.
items.author: IriLine Desk
